meaning: n.[希神]梯厄斯忒斯(Pelops 之子)
examples: A king of Mycenae, brother of Thyestes and father of Agamemnon and Menelaus.
Atreus: a king of Mycenae brother of thyestes and father of Agamemnon and Menelaus.
The Midnight Club came on nicely from his Thyestes run and it is nice to see Arbor Supreme come back into a bit of form.
